headline.purpose: Panel, modal, and dashboard section titles.

title.purpose: Room names, card headings, and popover labels.

body.purpose: Compact product copy and form help.

label.purpose: Buttons, chips, metadata, and state text.

shadows.name: signal-glow
shadows.purpose: Active, live, selected, or focused state only.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, hover, and compact state transitions.

motion.name: live-pulse
motion.purpose: Live chip dot only; disable under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The local primary action: violet, compact, mono, and stateful.

components.name: Ghost Rail Button
components.description: Muted icon/navigation action that becomes clear on hover or active state.
components.html: <button class="ds-rail-button" aria-label="Active rooms"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 12a8 8 0 1 1 16 0a8 8 0 0 1-16 0Zm5 0a3 3 0 1 0 6 0a3 3 0 0 0-6 0Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-rail-button{display:grid;place-items:center;width:40px;height:40px;border:0;border-radius:16px;background:transparent;color:#94a3b8;transition:background 120ms ease,color 120ms ease,box-shadow 120ms ease}.ds-rail-button svg{width:16px;height:16px}.ds-rail-button:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:#f8fafc}.ds-rail-button:focus-visible{outline:2px solid oklch(0.68 0.19 265);outline-offset:2px}.ds-rail-button[data-active=true]{background:#201b33;color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(192,108,255,.55)}

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Dark discovery search field with strong placeholder contrast and icon room.
components.html: <label class="ds-search"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3m1.3-5.2a6.5 6.5 0 1 1-13 0a6.5 6.5 0 0 1 13 0Z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg><input placeholder="Search rooms..." /></label>
components.css: .ds-search{position:relative;display:block}.ds-search svg{position:absolute;left:16px;top:50%;width:16px;height:16px;transform:translateY(-50%);color:#94a3b8;pointer-events:none}.ds-search input{width:100%;height:44px;padding:0 12px 0 44px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);border-radius:12px;background:#101725;color:#f8fafc;font:400 13px/1.45 'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;letter-spacing:.01em;outline:none;transition:border-color 120ms ease,box-shadow 120ms ease}.ds-search input::placeholder{color:#94a3b8}.ds-search input:focus{border-color:oklch(0.68 0.19 265);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px oklch(0.68 0.19 265/.28)}

components.name: Live Status Chip
components.description: Compact state chip for live stream status.
components.css: .ds-chip-live{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;height:22px;padding:0 8px;border:1px solid color-mix(in oklch,oklch(0.72 0.22 25) 55%,transparent);border-radius:999px;background:color-mix(in oklch,oklch(0.72 0.22 25) 22%,transparent);color:#f8fafc;font:700 .68rem/1.2 'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;letter-spacing:.04em}.ds-chip-live span{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:999px;background:oklch(0.72 0.22 25);box-shadow:0 0 8px oklch(0.72 0.22 25);animation:ds-live-pulse 1.6s infinite}@keyframes ds-live-pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}50%{opacity:.55;transform:scale(.85)}}@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.ds-chip-live span{animation:none}}

components.name: Raised Panel
components.description: Persistent or transient navy panel with disciplined radius and soft line.
components.html:
Global Stats

Room activity and presence signals.

narrative.overview: BhayanakCast is a compact live-room product UI, not a marketing surface. It should feel like a signal-rich operations deck for public discovery, active streams, room membership, and platform moderation: dark, dense, immediate, and legible under motion. The mono-forward typography, narrow rail, violet signal glow, live coral status, and slate-navy panels are identity, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Dense dark-mode product shell with a fixed narrow rail and compact panels.
JetBrains Mono as the primary UI voice for labels, data, navigation, and room state.
Violet is a signal color for primary actions, current navigation, and active affordances; coral is reserved for live/danger urgency.
Tonal layering carries most depth; glows appear only for active/live/hover/focus states.
Room semantics win over visual prototype nostalgia: Room Member Tiles, Stream Previews, Hosts, Past Streams, Reports, and Platform Admins must be labeled accurately.

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Violet is for primary action, current selection, and state confirmation only; if more than 10% of a screen glows violet, the interface is shouting.

rules.name: The Coral Means Live Rule
rules.body: Coral belongs to live/danger urgency. Do not spend it on decorative gradients, avatars, or generic emphasis.

rules.name: The State Glow Rule
rules.body: Glow must communicate active, live, selected, or focused state. Decorative glow on inactive surfaces is prohibited.

dos: Do preserve the dense dark mono shell: Void Deck background, Rail Night chrome, Panel Navy inputs, and JetBrains Mono UI text.
Do use Stream Violet for primary action, current navigation, selection, and focused affordances.
Do reserve Live Coral for live/danger urgency and pair it with text or icon cues, never color alone.
Do include visible focus states, keyboard paths, and reduced-motion alternatives for dialogs, menus, tabs, tiles, and stream controls.
donts: Don't make BhayanakCast look like a generic SaaS dashboard, cream marketing page, or gradient-text hero site.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default surface treatment or blur panels just to make them feel premium.
Don't imply a single broadcast/audience model; rooms contain multiple member streams and explicit stream subscriptions.
Don't use oversized card radii (32px+), side-stripe accent borders, repeating stripe backgrounds, decorative sketch SVGs, or wide soft shadows paired with decorative borders.
